creator: hardy.schumacher@gmx.de
text:
When I close Firefox-3.6, after I started it the first time, it's processes are still there (=> "/bin/sh /usr/local/bin/firefox3", "/bin/sh /usr/local/lib/firefox3/run-mozilla.sh /usr/local/lib/firefox3/firefox-bin", "/usr/local/lib/firefox3/firefox-bin"). When I want to start Firefox-3.6 again, it won't start, because Firefox is saying, that there is another instance running but not responding. 
After I killed all of the listed processes manually, Firefox starts again, but the issue won't happen again (=> it's only there after the first start).

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: The issue is always there, after I started my PC with Gnome environment, and started Firefox-3.6 the first time.
